tools.name: cycles.getApiRnsPubCycles
tools.description: List cycles filtering by some arguments.

tools.name: cycles.getApiRnsPubCyclesCycleId
tools.description: Retrieve a specific cycle by its ID.

tools.name: cycles.postApiRnsPubCyclesCycleIdRetry
tools.description: Every subscription order has an execution count called cycle, which determines the position of an order counting from when the shopper subscribed. This endpoint reruns a cycle that is currently in error state.

tools.name: plans.getApiRnsPvtPlans
tools.description: List plans filtering by some arguments.

tools.name: plans.getApiRnsPvtPlansId
tools.description: This endpoint retrieves a specific plan by its ID.

tools.name: reports.getApiRnsPvtReports
tools.description: List all report templates available.

tools.name: reports.getApiRnsPvtReportsReportNameDocumentsDocumentId
tools.description: Retrieve a specific report document by its Id.

tools.name: reports.postApiRnsPvtReportsReportNameDocuments
tools.description:
This endpoint creates a new report in the format of a CSV file and sends it via email. You can generate one of the following reports: 

 - subscriptionsWithStatus 

 - subscriptionsScheduledBetweenDate 

 - subscriptionsUpdatedBetweenDate 

 - subscriptionsCreatedBetweenDate 

 - executionsBetweenDate

tools.name: settings.editSettings
tools.description: Edits Subscriptions settings in your store.

tools.name: settings.getSettings
tools.description: List the details of the settings of a given subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.deleteApiRnsPubSubscriptionsIdItemsItemId
tools.description: Removes a specific item from a given subscription

tools.name: subscriptions.getApiRnsPubSubscriptions
tools.description: List subscriptions filtering by some arguments.

tools.name: subscriptions.getApiRnsPubSubscriptionsId
tools.description: Retrieve a specific subscription by its ID.

tools.name: subscriptions.getApiRnsPubSubscriptionsSubscriptionIdConversationMessage
tools.description: Retrieve all conversation messages sent to a customer regarding a given subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.patchApiRnsPubSubscriptionsId
tools.description: Update a specific subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.patchApiRnsPubSubscriptionsIdItemsItemId
tools.description: Edit a given item on a specific subscription

tools.name: subscriptions.postApiRnsPubSubscriptions
tools.description: Create a new subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.postApiRnsPubSubscriptionsIdItems
tools.description: Add a new item to a given subscription.

tools.name: subscriptions.postApiRnsPubSubscriptionsIdSimulate
tools.description: Simulates an order made by the specific subscription on checkout and retrieves the current price for items and shipping.

tools.name: subscriptions.postApiRnsPubSubscriptionsSimulate
tools.description: Simulates an order made by subscriptions on checkout and retrieves the current price for items and shipping.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
